prestazioni: 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 engine: Full bolt-on package with HKS Hi-Power exhaust (cat-back, 70mm dual outlets), GReddy Evolution GT II turbo kit (Garrett GTX3076R turbo, 10.5psi base boost, 3-inch stainless downpipe with high-flow catalytic converter), and AEM Infinity 708 ECU reflash (optimized for 93 octane, 450whp target with stock internals, aggressive VVT timing for mid-range torque)

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear spring rates, monotube dampers with remote reservoirs) paired with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow aluminum) and Whiteline rear sway bar (24mm adjustable)

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way, 45% preload) with Motul Gear 300 75W-90 fluid, StopTech Trophy BBK (380mm front rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads, and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines
estetica: Varis Japan GS F-style front bumper (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) with Seibon carbon fiber hood (dual heat extractors, 50% weight reduction over stock)

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (flares extended 30mm per side, custom rear diffuser with integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust cutouts) painted in BASF RM Diamond White with 3M Matte Black wrap on roof and pillars

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear), paired with DBA 4000 Series slotted rotors and custom gold anodized wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear)
